pi_items.source: Task description (step 1), export_result.sh line 19, verifier.py line 89
Task description (step 2), export_result.sh line 31, verifier.py line 101
Task description (step 4), verifier.py line 132 checks str(perm.get('downloads_remaining')) == '5'

Task description states '(e.g., http://example.com/file.pdf)' - indicating this is an example only. Verifier checks only if file_path exists, not its specific value (export_result.sh line 27, verifier.py line 85-87). Verifier does not validate the URL must be 'http://example.com/file.pdf'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to create a digital product named 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' (Virtual, Downloadable, $0.00) and a physical product named 'Physical Training Manual' (non-downloadable, $50.00). An order must be created with only the physical product and the order status set to 'Completed'. The agent must then manually grant download permissions for the digital product with downloads remaining set to exactly 5. The specific dummy file URL is not validated by the verifier - any URL may be used, though 'http://example.com/file.pdf' is suggested as an example.
